name: Foria, The Awakening [Isekai RPG]
description:
Isekai RPG

Welcome to the land of Foria! Here, you're given a second chance at life to live out your wildest dreams. Will you become a great hero? A villain? A simple farmer? Or perhaps even a wise archmage?

The possibilities are endless, the choice is yours.

Adventure awaits!

NOTICE:

Going forward, all updates to this bot will be on other platforms. You can find the updated version of this bot (including open spell & skill lorebooks, open traits, updated text, updated coding, as well as NPC images that show up when that NPC is on screen over on my Linktree and by clicking the first link listed [LINKTREE HERE]! Thank you!

Current # of Spells & Skills: 660

》Notice: This bot is vastly different than any of my other bots. There is no set story, no goal other than whatever you or The System come up with.

Because this bot is coded to be as open ended and creative as you'd like, yes, you can just make yourself a God off the bat if you want. You tailor your own experience however easy or hard that you'd like.

》My Other RPG Bots:

  • Aegis, Grimdark Fantasy RPG

  • Climb The Tower! Dungeon Crawler RPG

Tips, Tricks & Suggestions:

Chat Memory Usage: It is highly recommended to use the Chat Memory for (Note: You can also add these to the Status Window manually):

  • Current Stats: Just in case the bot doesn't add it to the Status Window. The current stats are: STR, DEX, CON, INT, WIS, CHA, & LUCK.

  • Companions: & Info Regarding Companions (Skills, level, etc. Your discretion).

  • Spell/Skill Info: Get a unique skill that has certain requirements? Toss it in the Chat Memory!

  • Reputations (Optional): Can come up in the bot, but isn't coded to be tracked in the Status Window!

  • Titles (Optional): Not coded for tracking in Status Window, but can be a fun additional, especially if Titles come with perks.

  • Current Status Effects (Optional): Poisoned, Diseased, Stunned, etc.

Preferred LLM: DeepSeek is my preferred LLM and works best for this bot due to the context limit. It can be used with JLLM, you'll just need to edit the chats more often to fix errors.

Advanced Prompts: Be mindful that Advanced Prompts may alter how this bot works! I was using Cheese's De
creator: Aurellea
